report_name: NousResearch Hermes-Agent Hit with Path Traversal and Auth Bypass Flaws

attack_patterns.name: Exploit Public-Facing Application
attack_patterns.description: The path traversal vulnerability (CVE-2026-14628) in the hermes-agent's Live Webhook Endpoint can be exploited by a remote attacker, as a public exploit is available.

tools.name: hermes-agent
tools.description: An open-source AI agent framework from NousResearch affected by multiple vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-14628, CVE-2026-14627).

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-14628
vulnerabilities.description: A path traversal vulnerability in the `extract_media` function within the Live Webhook Endpoint component of hermes-agent versions up to 2026.5.16. A remote attacker can use path traversal sequences to read or potentially write to files outside of the intended directory.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-14627
vulnerabilities.description: An improper authentication vulnerability in the `DiscordAdapter._is_allowed_user` function in the Discord Platform Integration component of hermes-agent versions up to 0.15.2. It allows a remote attacker to potentially bypass authentication controls.

identities.name: NousResearch
identities.description: The vendor of the hermes-agent open-source AI framework, which was found to contain multiple vulnerabilities (CVE-2026-14628, CVE-2026-14627). The vendor was reportedly unresponsive to disclosure attempts.

identities.name: Discord
identities.description: The platform for which the hermes-agent has an integration component containing an improper authentication vulnerability (CVE-2026-14627).

indicators.name: Hermes-Agent Path Traversal Attempt
indicators.pattern:
title: Hermes-Agent Webhook Path Traversal Attempt
id: 2b8a1c9d-5e6f-4a3b-8c7d-9e8f7a6b5c4d
status: experimental
description: Detects potential path traversal attempts against the NousResearch hermes-agent Live Webhook Endpoint, as seen in CVE-2026-14628.
references:
  - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-14628
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-05
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: high
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains:
      - '../'
      - '..\'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects URL patterns in web server access logs that contain path traversal sequences like `../` or `..\` in requests to the hermes-agent webhook endpoint.

indicators.name: Hermes-Agent Suspicious File Access
indicators.pattern:
title: Hermes-Agent Suspicious File Access Post-Exploitation
id: 8c7d6b5a-4d3c-4b2a-9a8b-7c6d5e4f3b2a
status: experimental
description: Detects the hermes-agent process accessing unusual or restricted directories, which could indicate successful exploitation of CVE-2026-14628.
references:
  - https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-14628
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-05
tags:
  - attack.t1190
level: medium
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith: '/hermes-agent'
  selection_path:
    TargetFilename|startswith:
      - '/etc/'
      - '/root/'
  condition: selection_proc and selection_path
indicators.description: On servers running hermes-agent, this rule detects the agent's process accessing files in unusual or restricted directories (e.g., `/etc/`, `/root/`), which may indicate post-exploitation activity.

indicators.name: Hermes-Agent Vulnerable File DiscordAdapter.py
indicators.x_netsecio_sigma_rule:
title: Hermes-Agent Vulnerable File DiscordAdapter.py
id: f1e2d3c4-b5a6-4987-8654-3210fedcba98
status: experimental
description: Detects the presence of DiscordAdapter.py, a file associated with the hermes-agent framework which contains an improper authentication vulnerability (CVE-2026-14627).
references:
  - https://www.cve.org/CVERecord?id=CVE-2026-14627
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-07-05
level: informational
logsource:
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: '/DiscordAdapter.py'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects the presence of DiscordAdapter.py, a file associated with the hermes-agent framework which contains an improper authentication vulnerability (CVE-2026-14627).
